title: Must Watch before Buying Property #property #rera #building #flat #newhouse #finsaheli
description:
Buying a property? Don’t get caught off guard! 

This video shows you how to use the RERA website to thoroughly research any under-construction building before you invest a single rupee.
With just a few clicks, you can find out:
* Project prices and floor plans
* How many flats have already been booked (avoid projects riddled with unsold units!)
* Construction progress and completion timelines
* Developer track record and any legal issues In this video, we uncovered a shocking truth: half the flats in a supposedly “hot” project were still unsold!
Is this a red flag? Watch to find out!
Empower yourself with knowledge. Learn how to navigate the RERA website and make informed decisions about your dream home.
.
.
#property #home #dreamhome #properties #builder #newhome #homeloans #loan #finsaheli
